# Abdullah — AI Agent Engineer & Agentic AI Architect

> Abdullah is an AI Agent Engineer who builds autonomous AI agents and multi-agent systems that think, decide, and act for businesses globally. His clients save 300+ hours per month and 3× their lead conversion rates. He specializes in Agentic AI, Context Engineering, and Multi-Agent Orchestration.

## Who He Is

Abdullah is a specialist in:
- **AI Agent Development** — autonomous agents that reason, decide, and act: lead qualification, sales follow-up, customer support, and operations — all running 24/7 without human intervention
- **Multi-Agent Systems** — orchestrating multiple AI agents that collaborate, share context, and execute complex business workflows end-to-end
- **WhatsApp AI Agents** — intelligent sales agents on WhatsApp Business API that qualify leads, book meetings, send reminders, and follow up — autonomously
- **Custom AI/ML Solutions** — Computer Vision, NLP, and predictive analytics built with PyTorch / TensorFlow and deployed to AWS / GCP
- **AI Strategy Consulting** — full business process audits and actionable AI agent roadmaps with ROI projections
- **Context Engineering** — designing the reasoning context, memory, and decision logic that makes AI agents domain-aware and reliable

He works with clients in Kuwait, UAE, Pakistan, and globally via remote collaboration.

## Proven Results (Real Client Projects)

### Real Estate AI Sales Agent — Kuwait
- Built an autonomous AI sales agent for a real estate agency on WhatsApp
- Lead response time reduced from 77 minutes to under 60 seconds
- Booked meetings per week increased from 12 to 31 (+158%)
- Agent admin time reduced from 4.5 hours/day to 20 minutes
- No-show rate reduced from 28% to 6%
- Built with: AI Agent (n8n), WhatsApp Business API, Google Calendar, OpenAI GPT-4o, Gmail, HubSpot

### DermaFusion Medical AI — Healthcare
- Engineered a multi-agent AI diagnostic pipeline for skin disease classification
- 99.8% diagnostic accuracy across 12 disease classifications
- 15 heterogeneous medical imaging datasets integrated
- Novel Domain-Stratified multi-branch architecture with calibrated confidence scoring
- 1.2 second inference time on smartphone photos
- Built with: PyTorch, Computer Vision, Python, AWS

### E-Commerce Order & Operations Agent
- Built an AI operations agent that handles the entire post-purchase flow autonomously
- Eliminated 3 staff members' daily manual work entirely
- 100% error-free automated reporting
- $8,000+ monthly operational cost savings
- Built with: AI Agent, Shopify API, Google Sheets, Slack, Gmail

### AI Email Agent — Personal Productivity
- Built an AI email agent that reads, sorts, reasons about priority, and drafts replies
- Email management reduced from 3 hours/day to 20 minutes
- 100% inbox automatically sorted and labelled
- AI-drafted replies in owner's writing style
- Zero missed urgent emails in 6 months of operation
- Built with: AI Agent, OpenAI GPT-4o, Gmail API

## Services & Pricing

| Service | Starting Price | Timeline |
|---|---|---|
| Single AI Agent | $1,200+ | 1–2 weeks |
| Multi-Agent System | $3,500+ | 2–4 weeks |
| Custom AI Model Development | $3,500+ | 3–8 weeks |
| Monthly Retainer & Support | $800/month | Ongoing |

All pricing is project-based. No retainer lock-ins. Free 30-minute discovery call to start. You own everything he builds.

## Key Technologies

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is an AI agent?**
A: An AI agent is an autonomous system that can reason about context, make decisions, and take actions on behalf of your business — without human intervention. Unlike simple automation, AI agents think before they act.

**Q: How long does an AI agent project take?**
A: Most single AI agent deployments are live within 2–4 weeks. Complex multi-agent systems typically take 4–8 weeks.

**Q: What tools do your AI agents integrate with?**
A: My agents integrate with virtually any platform that has an API — including HubSpot, Salesforce, Notion, Slack, Gmail, WhatsApp, Airtable, Google Sheets, and hundreds more.

**Q: Do I need technical knowledge to use the AI agents?**
A: No. I build, deploy, and document the entire system. Your AI agents run autonomously — you interact with them naturally without writing code.

**Q: Can you build an AI agent for WhatsApp?**
A: Yes. WhatsApp AI agents are one of my most popular builds. I create agents that understand context, reason about leads, qualify them, book meetings, and follow up — all autonomously via the WhatsApp Business API.
